name: abap-cloud-rap
description: ABAP Cloud / RAP overlay: clean core enforcement, RAP behavior design, CDS layering, ATC remediation. Three skills — /abap-cloud-rap:rap-bo-design, :atc-remediation, :clean-core-check — each loading the rule set from CLAUDE.md on invocation. Self-contained; install the clean-abap plugin separately if you want the universal Clean ABAP rules and skills as well (no cross-plugin loading at runtime). Targets BTP ABAP Environment and S/4HANA on-prem in the ABAP Cloud development model.
